title: astragalus nummularioides
intro: Astragalus nummularioides, also known as the coin-flower astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote immune function. The medicinal properties of Astragalus nummularioides have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus nummularioides is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
